title: Japan’s LDP Mulls Transparency Rules for Shareholder Activists
title_cn: 日本自民党考虑为股东活动人士制定透明度规则
summary: Japan’s Liberal Democratic Party is considering measures to make the behavior of activist investors more transparent and to help companies deal with the challenges they create, a lawmaker of the ruling party said in an interview.

title_cn: 印度微型股以突破信号挑战模糊的宏观经济
summary: The Bloomberg India Micro Cap Index has formed a  technical signal watched by traders.

title: Higher Bond Yields Are Here to Stay in a Post-War World
title_cn: 战后世界债券收益率将保持较高水平
summary: Higher government spending is still worrying investors.

title: Gold Steadies as US and Iran Prepare to Sign Interim Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国和伊朗准备签署临时和平协议，金价稳定
summary: Gold steadied after a four-day gain as the US and Iran prepared to sign an interim peace agreement that may ease global inflationary pressures arising from the war.

title: Brexit Bears Some Blame for EU’s Capital Market Inertia, EIB Chief Says
title_cn: 欧洲投资银行行长表示，英国脱欧是欧盟资本市场惰性的部分原因
summary: The UK’s exit from the European Union is partly responsible for the bloc’s failure to integrate its capital markets, the European Investment Bank president said.

title: Starmer Hot Mic Moment Suggests Breakthrough in India Trade Row
title_cn: Starmer 的热门麦克风时刻表明印度贸易争端取得突破
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer raised expectations that Britain has resolved a trade impasse with India, when he and Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi were caught on a microphone at the G7 summit in France saying some form of agreement had been reached.

title: Third Iran-Linked Crude Carrier Crosses US Blockade Toward Asia
title_cn: 第三艘与伊朗有关的原油运输船穿越美国对亚洲的封锁
summary: A third fully-loaded crude tanker has left the Iranian port of Chabahar and crossed the US blockade line heading toward Asia, just days before the planned signing of a ceasefire that will give Tehran the right to sell oil immediately.

title: Rupee Hits Six-Week High as India’s Inflow Measures Draw Demand
title_cn: 印度的资金流入措施吸引需求，卢比触及六周高位
summary: India’s rupee rallied to the strongest level in six weeks, fueling bets the currency can extend gains helped by the authorities’ steps this month to boost foreign-currency inflows.

title: Oil Slides Below $75 as Hormuz Reopening Trade Gathers Pace
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹重新开放贸易步伐加快，油价跌破 75 美元
summary: Oil briefly touched a fresh three-month low, before paring its losses, with prices under heavy pressure from a looming US-Iran deal that threatens to add a gush of barrels back to the market.

title: US Futures Rise as Dovish Bets Build Before Fed: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 随着美联储之前鸽派押注的增加，美国期货上涨：市场结束
summary: US stock futures advanced while oil steadied as investors awaited the Federal Reserve’s policy decision for clues on the interest-rate outlook.

title: ECB Officials Say Iran Deal Isn’t Enough to Fix Energy Shock
title_cn: 欧洲央行官员称伊朗协议不足以解决能源冲击
summary: European Central Bank officials are signaling that a US-Iran peace accord won’t necessarily stop them lifting interest rates further, even if it prevents a more pronounced overshoot in inflation.

title: Aviation Debt Boom Rolls On as Mideast Tensions Ease Further
title_cn: 随着中东紧张局势进一步缓和，航空债务激增
summary: Athens International Airport SA and TAP Air Portugal are adding to a record start to the year for borrowing by the aviation sector globally, as the industry looks to navigate the impact of the Middle East war.

title: BMW Sees Profit Margin as Low as 1% as China Demand Weakens
title_cn: 中国需求疲软，宝马利润率低至1%
summary: BMW said its profit margin will fall to as little as 1% this year as weakening Chinese demand and fallout from the Middle East conflict take a growing toll. The German automaker plans additional cost savings beyond those already announced. Danny Lee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ethiopia Dollar Sales Pass $2 Billion as Parallel Market Rate Surges
title_cn: 平行市场汇率飙升，埃塞俄比亚元销售额突破 20 亿美元
summary: Ethiopia’s latest special auction has pushed dollar sales this year above the $2 billion mark, as authorities step up efforts to support the birr and narrow the gap between the official and parallel-market exchange rates.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 6/17/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 6/17/2026
summary:
Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg. 

Correct: video edited to remove incorrect graphic at 20:51. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HDFC Bank Secures Tightest-Ever Spread on Its Dollar Bond
title_cn: HDFC 银行的美元债券利差创历史新高
summary: HDFC Bank Ltd. secured its tightest-ever spread on a dollar bond issue, showing strong investor demand for India’s largest private lender despite recent governance concerns.

title: Bond Rally Fails to Allay Higher-for-Longer Global Rates Threat
title_cn: 债券反弹未能缓解全球利率长期走高的威胁
summary: Governments around the world look to be facing lofty borrowing costs for at least the rest of the year, even as the fragile Middle East truce lowers energy prices and curbs inflationary fears.

title: Wall Street Wants to Cryptofy Your Stocks
title_cn: 华尔街想要加密你的股票
summary: Putting stocks and other assets on the blockchain can make trading faster, smoother and available 24/7, say the technology’s boosters.

title: JPMorgan’s Gimber Sees Value in European Stocks After Oil Shock
title_cn: 摩根大通的 Gimber 认为石油危机后欧洲股市的价值
summary: European equities offer value opportunities following the recent decline in oil prices, particularly consumer-facing stocks and energy-sensitive cyclicals, according to JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s Hugh Gimber.

title: Japan’s Humble 10-Yen Coin Now Worth 10.4 Yen On AI Copper Rally
title_cn: AI 铜价上涨，日本不起眼的 10 日元硬币现在价值 10.4 日元
summary: Japan’s 10-yen coin, predominantly composed of copper, is now worth more in metal than its face value as AI-fueled demand boosts prices for the highly conductive material.

title: China’s Regulator to Support Launch of Active ETF Products
title_cn: 中国监管机构支持推出主动型ETF产品
summary: China’s regulator gave the greenlight for the rollout of actively managed exchange-traded funds, expanding the range of investment products available in the world’s second‑largest stock market and bringing it closer in line with more developed peers.

title: JPMorgan Sees 'Ample Opportunities' in European Stocks
title_cn: 摩根大通认为欧洲股市有“充足的机会”
summary: Hugh Gimber, global market strategist at JPMorgan, discusses the outlook for European equities and where to allocate investment outside the tech industry. "I think the banks have further room to run," Gimber tells Bloomberg Television. "And then you think about places like chemicals, very, very energy intensive, the first place for people to look during an energy shock." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Tankers U-Turn, Rush to Mideast Before Hormuz Reopening
title_cn: 油轮掉头，在霍尔木兹重新开放之前赶往中东
summary: Two oil tankers heading toward Africa have U-turned in the Indian Ocean this week, switching their destinations to the Middle East as shipowners race to re-position vessels ahead of the possible reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Euro-Zone Wage Growth to Quicken in Second Half of This Year
title_cn: 今年下半年欧元区工资增长将加快
summary: Euro-area pay growth is set to accelerate in the second half of this year, while remaining far below previous peaks, the European Central Bank said as it gauges inflation risks from the Iran war.

title: Hong Kong Deals Spring to Life With Over $4 Billion of Listings
title_cn: 香港迎来春天，上市金额超过 40 亿美元
summary: Hong Kong is on track for at least 17 listings in June — the most since December — that are poised to raise as much as a combined $4.6 billion, with six of them taking investor orders from Wednesday.

title: Protests at Rio Tinto’s Mongolia Copper Mine Disrupt Cargoes
title_cn: 力拓蒙古铜矿抗议导致货物中断
summary: A protest at Rio Tinto Group’s massive Oyu Tolgoi copper mine in Mongolia is threatening deliveries of concentrate, according to a social media post from the company’s local subsidiary.

title: Signing of Iran MOU Isn't Fully Priced: 3-Minutes MLIV
title_cn: 签署伊朗谅解备忘录并未完全定价：3 分钟 MLIV
summary: Anna Edwards, Guy Johnson and Mark Cudmore break down today's key themes for analysts and investors on "Bloomberg: The Opening Trade."  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iron Ore Sinks Back Below $100 as Abundant Supplies Hurt Outlook
title_cn: 供应充足影响前景，铁矿石跌至 100 美元以下
summary: Iron ore sank below $100 a ton for the first time since March on signs of ample supplies just as demand in China faces headwinds.

title: Sarvam Becomes India's Latest AI Unicorn
title_cn: Sarvam 成为印度最新的人工智能独角兽
summary: Sarvam AI has become India's latest AI unicorn after raising $234M from investors including HCL Tech, Bessemer, and Khosla Ventures. Co-founder, Pratyush Kumar, joined Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin t (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SFC Moving Ahead With HK$1 Billion Evergrande Payout Plan
title_cn: 证监会推进恒大10亿港元派息计划
summary: Hong Kong’s market regulator is proceeding with its plan to compensate minority shareholders of collapsed developer China Evergrande Group, brushing aside a legal challenge by the company’s liquidators.

title: Iran to Gain Major Financial Relief Under Interim Deal With US
title_cn: 伊朗将根据与美国的临时协议获得重大财政救济
summary: Iran would be allowed to start oil exports immediately under an interim deal with the US and gain access to a $300 billion economic development program following negotiations for a permanent peace that’s meant to address Tehran’s nuclear activities, according to a draft of their agreement.

title: Japan Tourism Extends Decline on Reduced Flights, China Weakness
title_cn: 日本旅游业因航班减少而继续下滑，中国疲软
summary: Japan’s inbound tourism extended its decline in May, weighed down by reduced flights across routes and a prolonged slump in Chinese visitors.

title: AI Leaders Including Altman, Amodei Set to Attend G7
title_cn: Altman、Amodei 等人工智能领袖将出席 G7
summary: Artificial Intelligence industry leaders including OpenAI's Sam Altman and Anthropic's Dario Amodei are set to attend the Group of Seven Summit in France on Wednesday. Oliver Crook reports from Evian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Singapore’s Sea Tests AI Chatbot Migoo in Quiet US Foray
title_cn: 新加坡海上测试人工智能聊天机器人 Migoo 悄悄进军美国
summary: Singapore internet leader Sea Ltd. is rolling out a generative-AI chatbot in regions including the US, marking its maiden foray into the highly competitive American consumer market and accelerating its artificial intelligence push.

title: SpaceX Heads Toward Fourth Day of Gains Since Record IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 迎来创纪录 IPO 以来的第四个交易日上涨
summary: SpaceX shares are poised for a fourth straight day of gains, reinforcing the company’s place among the world’s largest after it surpassed Amazon.com Inc. by market value.

title: Asia Reports Sharp Rise in Cybercrimes and Scams, Interpol Says
title_cn: 国际刑警组织称亚洲网络犯罪和诈骗急剧增加
summary: Illegal cyber activities accounted for around a third of all crimes recorded in some Asian countries, with scams the most widespread and financially damaging, according to a new Interpol report.

title: General Atlantic in Talks to Lead Round for China’s Kling AI
title_cn: General Atlantic 正在洽谈领投中国 Kling AI 的融资
summary: Kuaishou Technology is in discussions with General Atlantic to lead a first round of financing for its video AI arm, seeking to secure a major US backer ahead of an initial public offering.

title: Singapore’s Electronics Exports Jump by Record on AI Demand Boom
title_cn: 人工智能需求旺盛，新加坡电子产品出口创历史新高
summary: Singapore’s electronic exports last month rose by the most on record on robust global demand for artificial intelligence-related equipment.

title: UK Accused of Failing to Block Illegal Casinos After Crackdown
title_cn: 英国被指控在打击非法赌场后未能阻止非法赌场
summary: Britain has been urged to bolster its efforts to clamp down on illegal gambling sites after a report found users were able to access unlicensed online casinos.

title: BOK Warns AI-Driven Bonus Windfalls May Stoke Broader Inflation
title_cn: 韩国银行警告人工智能驱动的意外奖金可能会引发更广泛的通货膨胀
summary: South Korea’s artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom may wind up complicating the inflation outlook, with the central bank warning that soaring bonuses at major technology firms could fuel broader wage growth and stronger consumer demand.

title: China Watchdog Urges More IPOs From AI, Hong Kong Listed Firms
title_cn: 中国监管机构敦促人工智能和香港上市公司进行更多IPO
summary: China’s top securities regulator pledged to welcome more domestic listings from artificial intelligence developers as well as Hong Kong traded firms to bolster onshore capital markets.

title: Top Philippine Fintech GCash Owner Wins Approval for Jumbo IPO
title_cn: 菲律宾顶级金融科技公司 GCash 的 Jumbo IPO 获批
summary: The company behind GCash, the Philippines’ top fintech firm, has secured approval from its board and shareholders for what could be the nation’s largest initial public offering.

title: Startup Backed by Ex-Google CEO Debuts Robot, LG Partnership
title_cn: 由前谷歌首席执行官支持的初创公司首次推出机器人，LG 合作
summary: A startup backed by former Google Chief Executive Officer Eric Schmidt unveiled an industrial robot powered by artificial intelligence, as investors pile into the emerging field of humanoids.

title: Lingyi Seeks to Raise Up to $1.1 Billion in Hong Kong Listing
title_cn: 灵益寻求在香港上市筹集至多11亿美元
summary: China’s Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. has started taking investor orders for a Hong Kong listing that may raise as much as HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion).

title: HSBC’s Jain on Hormuz Strait Reopening
title_cn: 汇丰银行的贾恩谈霍尔木兹海峡重新开放
summary:
Parash Jain, Global Head of Transport and Logistics at HSBC, says shipping companies remain in “wait-and-see” mode as the Strait of Hormuz edges closer to reopening under a US–Iran agreement.
He notes the next 40–50 days will be critical in determining whether more vessels can pass through, as de-mining operations are still underway. He does not expect significant movement in the short term.
He speaks with Shery Ahn and Haidi Stroud Watts on "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade". (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Drew $800 Million From Korean Investors on Trading Debut
title_cn: SpaceX 在首次交易时从韩国投资者那里筹集了 8 亿美元
summary: South Korean retail investors snapped up almost $800 million of SpaceX shares on the stock’s first day of trading, underscoring strong demand for Elon Musk’s company after local investors were shut out from the world’s largest initial public offering.

title: World Cup Exposes Growing Global Prediction Market Rift
title_cn: 世界杯暴露了全球预测市场日益扩大的裂痕
summary: This year’s World Cup is the first since prediction markets like Kalshi and Polymarket exploded to popularity as a new way to bet on sports.

title: HSBC Expects Over $100 Million Gains From Using Google AI Tools
title_cn: 汇丰银行预计通过使用 Google AI 工具获得超过 1 亿美元的收益
summary: HSBC Holdings Plc said it will use Alphabet Inc.’s Google Cloud to roll out artificial intelligence across its global operations, including through projects that can each generate more than $100 million in extra revenue or savings.

title: SoftBank Scales Back Latin America Tech Bets as Venture Capital Boom Fades
title_cn: 随着风险投资热潮的消退，软银缩减了对拉丁美洲科技的投资
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. is struggling to find startups in Latin America ready for major investments, underscoring how sharply the tech boom there has cooled since attracting record levels of venture capital only a few years ago.

title: Kalshi's Mansour Sees Uptick in Small Business Use of Hedging
title_cn: 卡尔希的曼苏尔认为小企业对套期保值的使用有所增加
summary: Kalshi co-founder Tarek Mansour discusses the increased utilization of hedging at the Bloomberg Market Structure Conference. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Brookfield-Backed Data Center Firm Csquare Files for US IPO
title_cn: 布鲁克菲尔德支持的数据中心公司 Csquare 申请美国 IPO
summary: Csquare Inc., a data center company backed by Brookfield Corp., filed publicly for a US initial public offering, joining a rush of debuts linked to artificial intelligence infrastructure.

title: AI Can Play 'Significant' Role in Tech for Managing Diabetes, Says David Roman
title_cn: 大卫·罗曼 (David Roman) 表示，人工智能可以在糖尿病管理技术中发挥“重要”作用
summary: David Roman,  US medtech and healthcare IT research analyst for Goldman Sachs, said that AI play a 'significant' role in helping patients stay on top of their diabetes, with companies like Abbott and Dexcom using new technology to count carbohydrates and deliver the right amount of insulin. Roman, joined by Bloomberg health reporter Madison Muller, said that he came away from Goldman Sach's annual medtech conference 'very bullish' on innovation across the industry.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Amazon Faces Billions in Penalties From Potential FTC Ad Suit
title_cn: 亚马逊因潜在的联邦贸易委员会广告诉讼而面临数十亿美元的处罚
summary: Amazon.com Inc. is facing a possible lawsuit from the US Federal Trade Commission that may lead to billions of dollars in civil penalties, over claims the e-commerce giant misled advertisers, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Seeking Crypto Policy 'Clarity' in DC
title_cn: 寻求华盛顿加密货币政策的“清晰度”
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Nathan Dean joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Congress and US regulatory agencies will likely embark on an agenda of clarifying the regulatory status of cryptocurrencies in the second half of 2026, lowering enforcement risks for platforms including Coinbase and Robinhood and building a foundation for institutional adoption of the sector. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Binance Prepares for EU Exit With Local License in Limbo
title_cn: 币安为欧盟退出做准备，当地许可证悬而未决
summary: Bloomberg's Anna Irrera joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Binance is making preparations to stop providing services in the European Union, as a deadline to receive a license to operate in the bloc draws near and the crypto exchange has yet to receive approval from Greece’s financial regulator. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Kalshi’s Lopes Lara Turned Kylie Jenner Gossip Into Billions
title_cn: 卡尔希 (Kalshi) 的洛佩斯·拉拉 (Lopes Lara) 如何将凯莉·詹纳 (Kylie Jenner) 的八卦变成数十亿美元
summary: Bloomberg's Emily Nicolle joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Kalshi has developed its own AI agent to help deal with a number of internal processes, including some of the thorniest issues it faces around the wording of its prediction market contracts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Overtakes Amazon in Value as Post-IPO Rally Reaches 49%
title_cn: SpaceX 市值超越亚马逊 IPO 后涨幅达 49%
summary: SpaceX jumped for a third straight day on Tuesday, overtaking Amazon.com Inc. in value to become the fifth-largest stock in the world.

title: BlackRock Launches New Bitcoin Income ETF
title_cn: 贝莱德推出新的比特币收益 ETF
summary: Robert Mitchnick, global head of digital assets at BlackRock, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." BlackRock launched today the iShares Bitcoin Premium Income ETF (Ticker: BITA). (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SEC Move Could Bolster Tokenized Stocks
title_cn: 美国证券交易委员会的举措可能会提振代币化股票
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Dushyant Shahrawat joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Recent comments from SEC Commissioner Paul Atkins hints that changes may come to Rule 611. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Crypto Short Squeeze Briefly Sends Value to $3T
title_cn: SpaceX 加密货币空头挤压导致价值短暂升至 3T 美元
summary: Bloomberg's Muyao Shen joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A short squeeze in SpaceX perpetual futures briefly sent the company’s implied valuation to $3 trillion on blockchain-based markets shortly after Monday’s US stock-market close. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Offering On-Chain Private Company Access: Citi's Khaliq
title_cn: 提供链上私人公司访问：花旗的 Khaliq
summary: Shahmir Khaliq, head of services at Citi, joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." A new initiative by Citi will allow its institutional clients to trade tokenized shares of private companies on a blockchain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Wrap: Strategy Buys More Bitcoin, Robinhood Cuts Jobs
title_cn: 加密货币包装：战略购买更多比特币，Robinhood 裁员
summary: Bloomberg's Monique Mulima joins Scarlet Fu and Tim Stenovec on "Bloomberg Crypto." Robinhood said it’s cutting 10% of its workforce, a reduction of around 300 positions, to “remain lean and disciplined” as it develops new products. Also, Strategy purchased 1,587 bitcoin tokens from June 8 to June 14 for aggregate purchase price of $100m (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Libya May Be Next in Oil-Fueled Trump Strategy
title_cn: 利比亚可能是特朗普石油战略的下一个目标
summary: The US is trying to bring the country’s rival camps together to unlock Africa’s largest oil reserves.

title: Trump Likes Structure of Canada’s China EV Deal, Carney Says
title_cn: 卡尼表示，特朗普喜欢加拿大与中国的电动汽车交易的结构
summary: President Donald Trump is happy with Canada’s arrangement to allow a capped number of Chinese electric vehicles to be imported at a low-tariff rate, Prime Minister Mark Carney said.

title: Read the 14-Point Draft Memorandum Between the US and Iran
title_cn: 阅读美国和伊朗之间的 14 点备忘录草案
summary: The US and Iran are expected to formally sign a memorandum of understanding on June 19 in Switzerland, paving the way for 60 days of talks aimed at ending their war for good and putting strict new limits on Iran’s nuclear program.

title: MIT Seeks to Fortify Military Ties After Hegseth’s ‘Woke’ Charge
title_cn: 赫格斯“觉醒”指控后，麻省理工学院寻求加强军事关系
summary: Leaders at the Massachusetts Institute of Technology have a complex equation to solve: President Donald Trump.

title: Philippines Says China Has Removed Structure in Disputed Shoal
title_cn: 菲律宾称中国已拆除争议浅滩上的结构
summary: A floating structure in a contested shoal in the South China Sea has been removed, the Philippines said, after Manila protested what it called an “illegal” move by Beijing.

title: UAE Moves to Cut Dependency on Strait of Hormuz to ‘Zero’
title_cn: 阿联酋将对霍尔木兹海峡的依赖降至“零”
summary: As the world awaits the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz following the signing of an interim peace deal between Iran and the US, the United Arab Emirates is working on a highly ambitious plan to try to end its dependence on the critical chokepoint.

title: Trump Says Nomination of US Intel Director Should Be Delayed
title_cn: 特朗普称应推迟提名美国英特尔总监
summary: President Donald Trump pressured Senate Republicans to delay confirming Jay Clayton as his next intelligence director, throwing a wrench into leaders’ plans to quickly install him before loyalist Bill Pulte could take the position on an acting basis.

title: Tice Confident About Reform's Chances in UK By-Election
title_cn: 泰斯对英国补选改革的机会充满信心
summary: Richard Tice, deputy leader of Nigel Farage’s right-wing Reform UK, says the party has a "cracking chance" in tomorrow's Makerfield by-election. Labour’s Andy Burnham is the favorite to win the vote in the northern England constituency, and Reform also faces competition from the new Restore party, which is even further to the right. Tice speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa’s DA Commits to Coalition Despite Clashes With ANC
title_cn: 尽管与非洲人国民大会发生冲突，南非发展议程仍致力于组建联盟
summary: The Democratic Alliance, South Africa’s second-biggest political party, remains “100%” committed to remaining in the ruling coalition, even though it isn’t functioning as intended, its new leader said.

title: South Africa’s DA Seeks Move for Steenhuisen to DTI, Rapport Says
title_cn: Rapport 称，南非 DA 寻求将 Steenhuisen 调往 DTI
summary: South Africa’s Democratic Alliance, the nation’s second-biggest political party, asked President Cyril Ramaphosa to make its former leader and current minister of agriculture, John Steenhuisen, the deputy minister of trade, industry and competition.

title: Starmer Rival Streeting Ready to Trigger Contest for Downing Street
title_cn: Starmer Rival Streeting准备引发唐宁街之争
summary: One of Keir Starmer’s leadership rivals, Wes Streeting, says he is ready to force an immediate contest if the UK Prime Minister does not step down after a special parliamentary election on Thursday.

title: Trump to Offer Iran Financial Boost in Peace Deal | Daybreak Europe 6/17/2026
title_cn: 特朗普将在和平协议中向伊朗提供财政支持黎明欧洲 6/17/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

Iran is set to receive broad financial incentives as part of its agreement with the US, including the right to sell oil immediately, tap a $300 billion development fund and get eventual access to its frozen assets, according to a final draft of the deal seen by Bloomberg.

Federal Reserve policymakers are expected to hold interest rates steady on Wednesday, posing an early test for new chairman Kevin Warsh as rising inflation erodes households’ purchasing power and President Donald Trump continues to press for lower borrowing costs.  

Today's guest: Maurice Levy, Publicis Chairman Emeritus & VivaTech Founder. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Europe Is Influencing Trump’s Stance on Ukraine at G7 Summit
title_cn: 欧洲正在影响特朗普在七国集团峰会上对乌克兰的立场
summary: World leaders gathered at this week’s Group of Seven meeting in France see Europe and the US converging in the view that Ukraine’s position is getting stronger, according to officials who asked not to be named as the discussions are private. "Russia should make a deal,” President Donald Trump told reporters Tuesday after having held brief discussions with Ukraine President Volodymyr Zelenskyy earlier in the day. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports from Evian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Quips 'I'm the Boss' as He Arrives Late for G7
title_cn: 特朗普在 G7 峰会迟到时打趣说“我是老板”
summary: Follow live updates from the final day of the G7 Leaders' Summit in Evian, France.

title: Restore Party Splits Right-Wing Vote in UK By-Election
title_cn: 复兴党在英国补选中分裂右翼选票
summary: Rupert Lowe was ejected from Reform UK in 2025 over alleged bullying and threatening behavior. His own party, Restore, is running its first candidate for Westminster in the Makerfield by-election, where Labour's Andy Burnham is the favorite to win. Bloomberg's Lucy White reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Warns of ‘Shortage of Trust’ Ahead of Trump Meeting
title_cn: 莫迪在特朗普会议前警告“信任缺失”
summary: Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and US President Donald Trump shook hands and smiled on the sidelines of a Group of Seven summit in France ahead of their first bilateral meeting in a year.

title: Australia Must be ‘Monocultural,’ One Nation’s Hanson Says
title_cn: One Nation 的汉森表示，澳大利亚必须是“单一文化”
summary: Australia’s hard-right leader Pauline Hanson has called for a “monocultural society,” rejecting decades of the country’s multiculturalism and blaming its housing crisis on high levels of immigration.

title: Taiwan Accuses Kenya of Detaining Scholar Under ‘China Pressure’
title_cn: 台湾指责肯尼亚在“中国压力”下拘留学者
summary: Taiwan blasted Kenya for “brazenly” blocking its participation at an international maritime event, after officials in the African country detained a scholar for 20 hours and declined to recognize her Taiwanese passport.

title: India Adopts China’s Strict Gaokao Playbook to Avert Exam Leak
title_cn: 印度采用中国严格的高考手册以避免考试泄密
summary: India is emulating China’s stringent playbook ahead of the national medical exam retest as Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s government seeks to rebuild trust after a paper leak imperiled the future of more than two million students.

title: The British MP Trying to Outflank Farage With Elon Musk’s Help
title_cn: 英国议员试图在埃隆·马斯克的帮助下包抄法拉奇
summary: When Rupert Lowe was ejected from Reform UK in early 2025 over alleged bullying and threatening behavior, party leader Nigel Farage thought he was cutting loose a liability. Instead, he created one of a different kind.

title: US Set to Offer Iran Broad Financial Gains in Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国将在和平协议中向伊朗提供广泛的经济收益
summary: Iran is set to receive broad financial incentives as part of its agreement with the US, including the right to sell oil immediately, tap a $300 billion development fund and get eventual access to its frozen assets, according to a final draft of the deal.

title: Duterte Ally Loses Philippine Senate Leadership Before Her Trial
title_cn: 杜特尔特盟友在受审前失去菲律宾参议院领导权
summary: The Philippine Senate elected a new leader on Wednesday after weeks of a power struggle that’s deepened political uncertainty ahead of Vice President Sara Duterte’s impeachment trial next month.

title: Putin Hosts First Southeast Asia Summit Since Ukraine Invasion
title_cn: 普京主持乌克兰入侵后首次东南亚峰会
summary: President Vladimir Putin will host leaders of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations, with energy security likely to top the agenda of their first summit since Russia’s full-scale invasion of Ukraine.

title: South Korea Seeks Trump’s Help on North Korean Nuclear Issue
title_cn: 韩国就朝核问题寻求特朗普帮助
summary: South Korea’s President Lee Jae Myung sought US President Donald Trump’s help in engaging with North Korea to resolve issues related to its nuclear program, in a brief exchange on the sidelines of the G7 summit in France on Tuesday, Lee’s office said.

title: FBI Says Drone Plot at White House Foiled by Worried Mom’s Call
title_cn: 联邦调查局称白宫无人机阴谋因妈妈忧心忡忡的电话而挫败
summary: Tycen Proper’s parents got worried after their 19-year-old son started communicating with “random” people online. They called law enforcement after he spent $3,000 of his graduation money on ballistic armor plates, a new shotgun and “lots” of ammunition, according to authorities.
